prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 5745→5389→5120→3439→3097，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），近 4 年累计前移约 2648 名，其中 2023→2024 年跳升 1681 名最为显著；2025 年基准位次约 3097 名；该校在湖南物理类招生计划 2021 年 105 人、2022 年 104 人、2023 年 111 人、2024 年 104 人、2025 年 103 人；2026 年计划 108 人，较 2025 年扩招 5 人（+4.85%），小幅扩招对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在第 21–25 名区间（2026 年排名第 23），属全国顶尖工科院校，对高分考生吸引力强；2024 年声誉评价偏负面（境外网络攻击事件），2026 年周期亦有校园安全相关舆情；抖音热度总排名第 74 位、评价「一般」，短视频曝光量中等；2021–2025 年均无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理整体平稳；第五轮学科评估中航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程均为 A+，机械工程 A，信息与通信工程、控制科学与工程、管理科学与工程均为 A-，共 7 个 A- 及以上学科，工科实力极为突出，对湖南物理类考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核心专业在 2024 年专业热度分析中均为「高热推荐」或「推荐」；航空航天/能源动力类专业热度持续偏热；本省物理类考生数从 2021 年 20.6 万持续增至 2025 年 32.0 万，2026 年预计达 34.7 万（+8.37%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校，在湖南无地域招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强势走势、2026 年小幅扩招（+5 人）的缓解效应、本省物理类考生增加 8.37% 的竞争加剧、以及学校顶尖工科实力与高热专业吸引力的多重作用，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 3097 名基础上继续前移，但扩招和声誉偏负面因素使前移幅度收窄；预测最低位次约 3117 名，区间 2649–3585 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5745→5389→5120→3439→3097, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition). Over the past 4 years, the ranking has moved forward by about 2648 places, with the most significant jump of 1681 places from 2023 to 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3097. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan was 105 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 111 in 2023, 104 in 2024, and 103 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 108, an increase of 5 students (+4.85%) compared to 2025, slightly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been stable in the 21st–25th range in recent years (ranked 23rd in 2026), making it a top-tier engineering institution in China, strongly attractive to high-scoring students. In 2024, its reputation was somewhat negative (due to overseas cyberattack incidents), and there was also campus security-related public opinion in the 2026 cycle. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 74th, with an 'average' evaluation and moderate short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cutoff drops or crashes, indicating generally stable application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Materials Science and Engineering were all rated A+, Mechanical Engineering was A, and Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering were all A-, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong engineering capabilities that continuously attract Hunan Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were all rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis. Aerospace/Energy and Power majors remain consistently popular. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province has increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025, and is expected to reach 347,000 in 2026 (+8.37%), intensifying competition due to the expanding candidate pool. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university in Hunan, so there is no regional enrollment preference in Hunan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuously advancing historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+5 students) as a mitigating factor, the 8.37% increase in local Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, and the multiple effects of the university's top-tier engineering strength and highly popular majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to advance from the 2025 baseline of 3097, but the expansion and slightly negative reputation factors will narrow the advancement. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3117, with a range of 2649–3585.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 3117, with a range of 2649–3585. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (2649) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Top Talent Program, Feitian Class, Huang Yushan Aviation Class, etc.). Candidates with rankings around the middle (about 3100) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation), while also considering Tier 1 majors with slightly lower ranking requirements. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound (3585) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also attempting Tier 2 majors with lower ranking thresholds.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次近年窄幅波动、2026 年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生大幅增加 31.18% 的竞争加剧效应，以及该校历史类专业非优势学科、专业热度一般的综合判断，预计 2026 年历史类最低位次在 2025 年基准 1832 名基础上小幅前移；预测最低位次约 1802 名，区间 1532–2072 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1953→1992→1978→1949→1832, fluctuating narrowly within the 1832–1992 range. In 2025, the ranking moved forward to 1832 (best in 5 years), with a baseline ranking of about 1832. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan was 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 23rd in the Soft Science Ranking, a top-tier engineering institution, but its History Category majors are not its strengths, so the level halo has limited appeal to History Category candidates. In 2024, reputation was slightly negative (overseas cyber attack), and in the 2026 cycle, there is campus security public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 74th overall, rated 'average'. No record of admission cutoff gaps, stable application psychology. The university's A+ disciplines are all engineering (Aerospace, Computer Science, Materials), while History Category majors (Economics and Trade, Foreign Languages and Literature, Marxist Theory, Business Administration) have no directly corresponding A-level discipline support, limiting the pull of disciplinary advantages for History Category applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The number of History Category candidates in the province was 166,000 in 2021→143,000 in 2025 (slight decrease), but is expected to reach 187,000 in 2026 (+31.18%), significantly increasing competition. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university, with no regional enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of History Category rankings in recent years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the intensified competition from a 31.18% increase in local History Category candidates, and the fact that the university's History Category majors are not its strengths with average popularity, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 1832. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1802, with a range of 1532–2072.
